title: bee cells archive/unarchive verbs + status archived-count
action: On top of cells-archive-1 primitives: add CLI verbs bee cells archive --feature <slug> and bee cells unarchive --feature <slug>. archive refuses unless the feature has ZERO open/claimed cells (all terminal: capped/dropped) AND it is not the currently-active state.feature; on success move each cell file to .bee/cells/archive/<feature>/ and write/update .bee/cells/archive/summary.json (per-feature capped/dropped counts + archived_at). unarchive moves them back. Wire the verbs through all touch-points (handler in bee.mjs, HANDLERS table, command-registry + lib mirrors, test_bee_cli execution check). bee status: counts stay from active listCells, PLUS an archived total read from archive/summary.json so the reported total is honest. Regenerate plugin trees + release manifest.

truths: bee cells archive --feature <slug> refuses (nonzero, named reason) if any cell in that feature is open or claimed, or if slug === active state.feature; on success moves every terminal cell file into .bee/cells/archive/<slug>/ and updates archive/summary.json.
bee cells unarchive --feature <slug> restores the moved files to .bee/cells/ and updates the summary.

bee status counts still come from the active dir (fast) and additionally report an archived total sourced from archive/summary.json — the grand total (active+archived) equals the pre-archive count (no cell lost from the books).
The new verbs are registered end-to-end (command-registry + mirrors, HANDLERS, usage, a test_bee_cli execution check) and test_lib_mirror + test_verify_manifest stay green.
Full verify (run_verify.mjs) green; plugin trees + release manifest regenerated; measured: bee status wall-time drops materially after archiving a closed feature vs the ~1435ms/356-cell baseline.
prohibitions: Do NOT archive a feature with open/claimed cells or the active feature.
Do NOT delete cells (move only) and do NOT drop archived cells from the honest total.
Do NOT reintroduce a full-history scan into the hot bee status path.

trace.outcome: Added archiveFeature/unarchiveFeature/archivedSummary/archivedTotals to cells.mjs (mirrored byte-identical to .bee/bin/lib/cells.mjs), wired bee cells archive/unarchive CLI verbs end-to-end (handlers, HANDLERS table, cellsUsageFallback, COMMAND_REGISTRY, test_bee_cli.mjs round-trip test), and added an honest archived figure to bee status sourced from the summary ledger (no directory scan). Verified live against this repo's real 358-cell store (archive/unarchive round trip on release-1-7-4, store left unchanged) and a synthetic benchmark showing listCells(default) ~6x faster than includeArchived over the same total N.
trace.verify_output: PASS run_verify: 34 suite(s), concurrency=5, wall=31054ms (includes test_lib_mirror byte-identity PASS and test_bee_cli.mjs PASS with the new cells.archive/cells.unarchive round-trip test)
